sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73134" key="o)li/zwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀλίζων</orth>, later spelling of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὀλείζων,</foreign> <sense id="n73134.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὀλίγος</ref> </xr> VI. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
